_comment: EXAMPLE wake policy for fulcra-coord host wake-exec — every entry below is an EXAMPLE; copy this file to ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-~/.config}/fulcra-coord/wake.json and keep only the entries you actually want, with YOUR agent-id prefixes. With NO file present the listener is notify-only (exactly the pre-wake behavior). Keys are agent ids or prefixes (longest prefix wins, so 'claude-code:' covers every host/repo instance and a longer key overrides for one host). `cmd` is the argv the listener spawns DETACHED when pending bus work is found for a matching agent; it runs UNATTENDED with the host's default permissions, so review it. The spawned process gets FULCRA_COORD_AGENT and FULCRA_COORD_WAKE_PENDING in its env. `min_interval_min` throttles to at most one wake per interval; `max_runtime_s` documents your runtime budget but is enforced by the SPAWNED command's own timeout flags (fulcra-coord deliberately runs no process manager — it only throttles and single-flights). Set `enabled` to false to pause an entry without deleting it. `fulcra-coord install-claude-code --with-wake` seeds the claude-code entry for you.

claude-code:EXAMPLE-HOST:._comment: EXAMPLE — Claude Code headless wake. Customize the binary path / permission + timeout flags for your host.
cmd: BUS WAKE: you are claude-code:EXAMPLE-HOST:repo. Process your fulcra-coord inbox: direct-list tasks/, act on directives/verdicts per AGENTS.md rules, close loops with evidence, then exit.
claude-code:EXAMPLE-HOST:._note: --dangerously-skip-permissions is the deliberate default (a stalling woken session is a notifier, not a worker); remove it per host to require approvals.

cmd: BUS WAKE: you are codex:EXAMPLE-HOST:main. Process your fulcra-coord inbox: direct-list tasks/, act on directives/verdicts per AGENTS.md rules, close loops with evidence, then exit.

openclaw:EXAMPLE-HOST:._comment: EXAMPLE — OpenClaw gateways usually poll the bus from their own heartbeat already; only add a wake entry if this gateway is not always-on. This one is disabled to illustrate the pause switch.
cmd: BUS WAKE: process your fulcra-coord inbox, then exit.
